title: SpongeSucc (Lava Sponge)
description: Quick and easy Lava Sponge making use of Powdered Snow with suck range configuration
body:
This Mod adds a Lava Sponge to the game, which can be used like Sponges and Drain Lava instead of Water. - Adds 3 New Blocks (Lava Sponge, Hot Lava Sponge & Hardened Lava Sponge) - Modifies Ancient City & Bastion Loot-tables to contain Lava Sponges - Configurable Draining Radius and Amount ## How to use **Crafting**: A Lava Sponge can be crafted using 4 Buckets, 3 Powdered Snow Buckets, 1 Hopper & 1 Magma Block. (Or they can be found in Ancient Cities/Bastions)

**Using**: Place in/around Lava, like a Sponge. It will drain Lava around once any Lava touches it (Including Flowing Sources)

**Reusing**: Placing a used Sponge on any type of Ice Block will harden it (Requires Pickaxe to break), which can then be placed into a furnace or in the Nether to be reheated and return to a usable Sponge. ## Requirements Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy Config editing ![we can suck](https://i.imgur.com/kniyXcj.gif) *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
